summary: Successfully tested two enhancements: 1) Transfers Queue search functionality - searches ENTIRE database (all statuses) by beneficiary name, sender name/email, IBAN, reference. 2) Card Requests N+1 fix - user_name and user_email included in backend response. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Transfer search correctly implemented in _search_transfers() at line 543 - searches beneficiary_name, beneficiary_iban, reference_number, details via regex, then also searches users by email/first_name/last_name
Search results correctly combine direct_matches and user_transfers avoiding duplicates
Card Requests N+1 fix correctly implemented in get_pending_card_requests() at line 53 - bulk lookup with users_map for O(1) lookups
Frontend AdminTransfersQueue.js correctly shows 'Showing X results across all statuses' during search and hides tabs
Frontend AdminCardRequestsQueue.js correctly displays user_name and user_email in table columns
seed_data_creation: No test data created - READ ONLY verification (LIVE BANKING APPLICATION)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two enhancements verified: 1) Transfers Queue has search bar that searches ALL statuses (SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED) at once. Search 'gildo' returns 2 results, search 'ashley' returns 13 results (by email), search 'Baccaro' returns 1 result (by sender name). 2) Card Requests page loads in <1s and shows user_name and user_email columns directly from backend (no N+1 queries).
features_verified: Transfers Queue search bar visible and functional - VERIFIED
Transfers search finds results across ALL statuses (not just current tab) - VERIFIED: 'a' returns 108 results from SUBMITTED, COMPLETED, REJECTED
Search shows 'Showing X results across all statuses' message - VERIFIED
Clear search button (X) works and returns to tab view - VERIFIED
Card Requests page loads fast (< 2 seconds) - VERIFIED: loads in 0.44s
Card Requests shows user names and emails in the table - VERIFIED: User and Email columns present
Card Requests tabs work (PENDING, FULFILLED, REJECTED) - VERIFIED
Card Requests View details shows user name and email - VERIFIED
Customer dashboard loads correctly - VERIFIED: balance, accounts, transactions visible

search_gildo.matches: Godo Rizzato, Gildo Rizzato - both SUBMITTED

card_requests_performance.improvement: Eliminated N+1 frontend queries via bulk user lookup in backend
